statement: In every magma, Equation 905 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (w * u))`) implies Equation 3050 (`x = (((x * x) * x) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0005
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op w u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op x x) x) x) x)
